backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the CampusVoice backend with complaint management (create, update, list) and user profile CRUD, protected by role-based access control (admin, user, guest) via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (admin/staff login flows, admin/staff portals, complaint management, analytics, emergency logs, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's React/TypeScript frontend components, pages, hooks, and services.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root at `#root` and loading `src/main.tsx` as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app shell managing public login flows (student, HOD, admin, staff) and the authenticated layout (sidebar, header, page routing) using a view-state pattern without a router, with loading skeletons and profile setup gating.
frontend/src/components/AdminLoginFlow.t: Renders the admin login page with an Internet Identity sign-in button, storing a pending role in localStorage before initiating login. Displays admin-specific feature benefits and a back button to return to role selection.
frontend/src/components/AIChatbot.tsx: Floating AI chatbot widget that maintains a conversation history, sends messages to the Gemini service, and supports text-to-speech playback for assistant responses.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Sticky top header component showing the app logo, role badge, notification bell, emergency alert button (students only), and a user dropdown with logout and delete account options. Handles emergency alert creation and notification management.
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx: Role-aware sidebar navigation component that renders different nav items for student, staff, HOD, and admin roles. Includes user profile display, logout, and delete account functionality.
frontend/src/components/ComplaintCard.ts: Card component for displaying a single complaint with status/priority badges, overdue indicator, media attachment counts, and role-aware student name display (anonymous for staff/HOD). Exports reusable StatusBadge and PriorityBadge sub-components.
frontend/src/components/DeleteAccountDia: Confirmation dialog that permanently deletes the user's account via a mutation, clears profile-specific localStorage keys, invalidates the React Query cache, and logs the user out. Preserves complaint metadata and shared system data.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyAlertOv: Full-screen overlay that displays an active emergency alert with student, location, time, and department details, playing a siren sound for HOD/admin/staff roles. Provides an acknowledge button that dismisses the overlay and updates the store.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackForm.tsx: A React component that renders a star-rating feedback form for resolved complaints, saving feedback locally via `updateLocalMeta` and displaying a read-only view once submitted.
frontend/src/components/HODLoginFlow.tsx: A login page component for Head of Department users that stores a pending role in localStorage and triggers Internet Identity authentication before redirecting to the HOD portal.
frontend/src/components/MediaUploader.ts: A media upload component that allows users to attach photos, videos, and audio files, converting them to data URLs and displaying a preview grid with removal support.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for first-time users to complete their CampusVoice profile by entering name, email, role, and optional department, then saving the encoded profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/StaffLoginFlow.t: A login page component for staff users that stores a pending role in localStorage and initiates Internet Identity login to access the staff complaint management portal.
frontend/src/components/StudentLoginFlow: A login page component for student users that stores a pending role in localStorage and triggers Internet Identity authentication to access the student complaint portal.
frontend/src/constants/appRoles.ts: Defines the CampusRole type and provides display label and Tailwind color mappings for each campus role (student, staff, hod, admin).
frontend/src/constants/complaintCategori: Defines all complaint categories grouped by domain, marks sensitive categories, and lists all academic departments supported by the application.
frontend/src/contexts/AppContext.tsx: Provides a global React context that exposes the authenticated user's profile, campus role, notifications, and emergency alerts, with auto-polling every 5 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state through a React context provider and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD and complaint operations (fetch, create, update status).
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for the campus teal/navy design system including light/dark themes, status badges, and sidebar styles.
frontend/src/lib/audioService.ts: Provides Web Audio API utilities for playing a confirmation beep, an emergency siren sound, and stopping all audio using oscillator nodes.
frontend/src/lib/complaintHelpers.ts: Utility functions for generating complaint IDs, calculating resolution deadlines based on priority, and formatting timestamps and overdue status.
frontend/src/lib/geminiService.ts: Wraps the Gemini REST API to provide AI-powered complaint text analysis, image analysis, and a chatbot response function using the gemini-2.0-flash model.
frontend/src/lib/localComplaintStore.ts: Manages localStorage persistence for complaint metadata, emergency alerts, and notifications, providing CRUD helpers for each data type.
frontend/src/lib/reportGenerator.ts: Generates and triggers browser downloads of complaint reports in JSON or CSV format, including summary statistics and per-complaint details.
frontend/src/lib/userProfileHelpers.ts: Encodes and decodes extended user profile data (display name, campus role, department) into a pipe-delimited string for storage in the ICP backend.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyticsPage.tsx: Analytics dashboard page that displays complaint status, priority, and monthly trend charts using Recharts, with role-based filtering and an AI-powered predictive analysis feature.
frontend/src/pages/ChatbotPage.tsx: Renders the AI Assistant page with a header and a placeholder card that directs users to the floating chat bubble widget in the bottom-right corner.
frontend/src/pages/ComplaintsListPage.ts: Displays a filterable, searchable list of complaints for admin/staff/HOD roles, supports status updates via mutation, and allows exporting the filtered list as a CSV file.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Role-aware dashboard that shows complaint statistics (registered, in-progress, resolved, high-priority) and quick-action navigation cards tailored to student, staff, HOD, or admin roles.
frontend/src/pages/EmergencyLogsPage.tsx: Admin page that lists locally stored emergency alerts with acknowledge and clear-all actions, displaying status badges and alert metadata.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page with a hero section, role-selection cards (Student, HOD, Staff, Admin) that navigate to their respective login views, and a feature highlights section.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitComplaintPage.t: Form page for students to submit complaints with description, category, priority, anonymous toggle, and media uploads, featuring optional Gemini AI analysis to auto-suggest category and priority.
frontend/src/pages/TrackComplaintsPage.t: A page that displays a student's submitted complaints with search/filter controls, CSV export, and a detail dialog showing complaint metadata, media attachments, timeline, and a feedback form.
frontend/src/pages/UserManagementPage.ts: A placeholder admin page for user management that explains users are authenticated via Internet Identity and managed through the decentralized backend, with no interactive functionality yet.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both regular and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Outfit), OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, custom shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: A project state manifest tracking schema version, existing implemented features, and pending new feature requests (admin portal, staff portal) with their requirement IDs and statuses.
